CatalogItemDefinition.description: Canonical catalog item definition returned by /items. Catalog entries are keyed by itemType and may omit runtime instance id.
CatalogItemDefinition.title: catalog-item-definition

distanceKm.description: Required only for radius queries. Omit together with positionKm for whole-system listing mode.

positionKm.description: Required only for radius queries. Omit together with distanceKm for whole-system listing mode.

celestialBody.description: Canonical celestial body payload, with distanceKm added for radius queries.

Complete canonical celestial body payload. When id is present, the server upserts by id. When id is omitted, the server derives a deterministic id from sourceScanId, createdByCharacterId, and missionId for mission-generated bodies.

composition.description: Asteroid material profile. Required unless state is unscanned.

observability.description: Required observability state for the body.

state.description: Canonical celestial body state. Composition may be omitted only when state is unscanned.

celestialBody.description: Present on successful celestial body upsert responses.

items.description: Character summary snapshot. Only id and characterName are guaranteed; additional canonical fields may be present.

Item.description: Canonical item payload for runtime item records. For catalog definitions returned by /items, use CatalogItemDefinition. Client-facing material requirements are defined only by fabrication.requiredMaterials[].itemType.

examples.description: Pressure-rated sealing sleeves for rerouting damaged ship conduits and stabilizing subsystem junctions.

requiredMaterials.description: Canonical material requirements for crafting/comparison. Clients should use requiredMaterials[].itemType values for lookups.

Item.title: item

item.description: Item create or partial update payload. For existing items, omitted fields preserve stored values. Explicit null clears item.container, item.spatial, or item.motion when those properties are present.

container.description: Optional container patch. Provide null to clear the container association.

motion.description: Optional motion patch. Provide null to clear motion state.

spatial.description: Canonical spatial position. Provide null to clear spatial state. The legacy item.kinematics field is not accepted.

state.description: Canonical item state. Setting state to destroyed causes the server to populate destroyedAt if it is not already set.

tier.description: Optional item tier. When omitted, the server preserves the existing value for updates or applies the canonical default for creates.

item.description: Present on successful item upsert responses.

hotkey.description: Launch slot hotkey. Must be one of the supported launch hotkeys 1 through 5.

itemType.description: Expected persisted item type for the launched item. Must match the stored item record.

yieldedItems.description: Yielded items from target-destroyed launches are deployed debris with canonical spatial coordinates and motion vectors.

itemId.description: Catalog or market inventory item id. The server normalizes matching case-insensitively.

quantity.description: Requested buy quantity. Must be a positive integer.

requestId.description: Optional caller correlation id echoed in the response.

transactionId.description: Optional caller-supplied transaction id. If omitted, the server creates one.

reason.description: Stable machine-readable failure reason when success is false.

requestId.description: Echoed caller correlation id when one was provided on the request.

transaction.description: Present on successful market buy responses.

reason.description: Stable machine-readable failure reason when success is false.
Stable machine-readable failure reason when success is false.

requestId.description: Echoed caller correlation id when one was provided on the request.

reason.description: Stable machine-readable failure reason when success is false.

requestId.description: Echoed caller correlation id when one was provided on the request.

itemId.description: Catalog or market inventory item id to sell. The server normalizes matching case-insensitively.

quantity.description: Requested sell quantity. Must be a positive integer.

requestId.description: Optional caller correlation id echoed in the response.

transactionId.description: Optional caller-supplied transaction id. If omitted, the server creates one.

reason.description: Stable machine-readable failure reason when success is false.

requestId.description: Echoed caller correlation id when one was provided on the request.

transaction.description: Present on successful market sell responses.

missionId.description: Canonical mission id. Must be one of the mission ids known to the server mission catalog.

requestId.description: Optional request correlation id echoed in the response when provided.

status.description: Mission lifecycle status. Supported values are available, started, in-progress, failed, completed, locked, abandoned, paused, and turned-in.

statusDetail.description: Optional freeform detail preserved with the mission status update.

mission.description: Present on successful mission upsert responses.

requestId.description: Echoed caller correlation id when one was supplied on the request.

createdAt.description: Ship creation timestamp when available. May be an empty string for legacy or synthesized ship records.

driveProfile.description: Present only when the ship has a valid normalized drive profile.

ships.description: Present on INVALID_SESSION responses for compatibility with shared error payload shape.

ship.description: Partial ship patch object. Nested patch intent is determined by property presence. When ship.inventory is present, the server applies the provided inventory patch. When ship.inventory is omitted, the server preserves existing ship inventory references.

damageProfile.description: Optional damage profile patch. Presence indicates patch intent for damage profile fields.

inventory.description: Optional inventory patch for the target ship. Presence indicates patch intent; omission preserves the current ship inventory references. Entries may be canonical ShipItem rows (`id`, `itemType`, `displayName`), compact references (`itemId`, `itemType`), or hydrated rows (`id`, `itemType`).

ownership.description: Optional ownership patch. Presence indicates ownership transfer/update intent.

ship.description: Present on successful ship upsert responses.

celestialBody.description: Canonical celestial body payload with optional catalog enrichments.

requestId.description: Echoed caller correlation id when one was supplied on the request.

solarSystem.description: Present on successful solar system lookup responses.

solarSystemSummary.description: Solar system registry summary enriched with optional count fields when available.

requestId.description: Echoed caller correlation id when one was supplied on the request.

starCatalogEntry.description: Canonical HYG star catalog entry returned by star and solar system queries.

requestId.description: Echoed caller correlation id when one was supplied on the request.

star.description: Present on successful star lookup responses.

starCatalogEntry.description: Canonical HYG star catalog entry returned by star and solar system queries.

requestId.description: Echoed caller correlation id when one was supplied on the request.
